comment: Stripe ↔ QuickBooks per-month reconciliation. Stripe side is sum of customer_profiles.transactions (status=succeeded) by type; QB side is the corresponding pnl_by_month line items. Variance = Stripe minus QB-recognized. Tie-out status: tight (≤1% variance), acceptable (≤5%), investigate (>5%). See `reconciling_items` for canonical reasons for residual variance.

reconciling_items.label: Annual lump-sum cash receipts
reconciling_items.description: Stripe records the full lump-sum amount in the month it was charged (e.g., B&B Door's $32,002.50 in May 2026). QB defers and recognizes monthly via Line 4100 "Annual Deferred Monthly" (~$3,173/mo). Variance reconciles over the 12–15 month coverage window.
reconciling_items.sign: Stripe > QB in receipt month; Stripe < QB in subsequent months.

reconciling_items.label: Sales tax inclusion
reconciling_items.description: Stripe gross charges include sales tax collected; QB separately books Line 4050 "Monthly Subscription Tax" (negative) to remove the pass-through. The Stripe-side numbers in this reconciliation use net_amount (post-refund) but still include any sales tax collected.
reconciling_items.sign: Small consistent positive variance in Stripe subscription line.

reconciling_items.label: Per-transaction stream reclassifications
reconciling_items.description: Some transactions are reclassified by `transaction_overrides.json` (e.g., Panhandle's $7,658 March charge moved from subscription → services). Stripe still shows them under their original type until you apply the overrides; QB books them per the corrected classification.
reconciling_items.sign: Lumpy variance in specific months matching override entries.

reconciling_items.label: Refund timing
reconciling_items.description: Stripe net_amount nets refunds against the original charge in the original month. QB books refunds in the period the refund occurred. Variance possible when a refund occurs in a different month than the charge.

reconciling_items.label: Stripe Connect fees
reconciling_items.description: Affiliate / Connect revenue is recorded in QB via Line 4200 "Stripe Fee Income" (Allmoxy's markup) and Line 4600 "Affiliate Referral Income". The Stripe-side `connect` column in `customer_profiles.transactions` is currently empty because Connect fees are tracked separately in the 6 Stripe Connect Revenue sheets, not in customer Stripe accounts. The Connect line in this report is informational only — Connect-side reconciliation lives in the Connect sheets.
reconciling_items.sign: Connect column in Stripe is $0 by design; QB has the real number.
